Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Hightower]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Hightower is the location of the Luminian headquarters.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Hightower is the Luminian citadel located just outside the borders of the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Hightower was built as a sanctuary for refugees fleeing from an Elder attack.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Hightower is a location with power that Calder seeks to amplify.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — The central tower of Hightower has a huge white diamond at its top.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Hightower emits light that strikes Jorin.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — The gate of Hightower is three stories high.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — A white beam blasts from Hightower.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
